description.value:
Frequency once per turn

You've learned how to harness the mechanics of the Gap to disrupt technology. You touch an adjacent object or creature with the tech trait. If the target is an unwilling creature or is held by an unwilling creature, the creature attempts a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:glitching] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. On a failure, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 1}. On a critical failure, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 2}.
